text: IN NO EVENT SHALL EITHER PARTY'S AGGREGATE LIABILITY UNDER THIS AGREEMENT EXCEED THE FEES PAID IN THE TWELVE (12) MONTHS PRECEDING THE CLAIM.
The parties' liability under this Agreement shall be as provided by applicable law, without further limitation.
Each party's total liability shall not exceed the total fees paid under this Agreement in the preceding twelve months.
No liability cap applies to either party under this Agreement.
Neither party shall be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages, including lost profits, even if advised of the possibility of such damages.
Both parties remain liable for all direct and indirect damages without limitation.
The foregoing limitation of liability shall not apply to damages arising from a party's gross negligence, willful misconduct, or breach of confidentiality obligations.
The liability cap applies to all claims without exception, including gross negligence.
Neither party shall be liable for loss of profits, even if such losses are direct damages arising in the ordinary course of events.
Each party's aggregate liability under this free pilot agreement shall be capped at the fees paid or payable in the preceding twelve months (which is zero).
Each party's liability for any single event shall not exceed $10,000, and in no event shall a party's total aggregate liability exceed $5,000.
The limitations set forth in this Section shall apply to all claims sounding in contract, but shall not apply to claims sounding in tort or statutory negligence.
